title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to admit you've done quite well. We should
have more than enough to repay that younger
student.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize you had such talent lurking within
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You have a rarely seen focus, or perhaps zeal. I
may have to reconsider my estimation of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No... I should save my praise for your work as a
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I expect just as much zeal from you in
that capacity.
